title: Chintamoni Kar Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Chintamoni Kar Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of West Bengal

heroImage.alt: Chintamoni Kar Bird Sanctuary, West Bengal

overview.short: Chintamoni Kar Bird Sanctuary (CKBS), formerly known as Kayaler Bagan, is a bird sanctuary located in West Bengal, India, south of Kolkata.
overview.description: Chintamoni Kar Bird Sanctuary (CKBS), formerly known as Kayaler Bagan, is a bird sanctuary located in West Bengal, India, south of Kolkata. This garden is famous for its wide variety of birds, butterflies, ferns and orchids.

topPlaces.name: Narendrapur Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Narendrapur Wildlife Sanctuary in South 24 Parganas District, West Bengal is an Orchard Plantation and constitutes only 17 acres (69,000 m2) and is rich in smaller birds, specially paradise flycatcher, oriole, etc.

topPlaces.name: Ramakrishna Stadium
topPlaces.description: Ramakrishna Stadium is a multi-purpose stadium in Narendrapur, South 24 Parganas district. The ground is mainly used for organizing matches of football, cricket, and other sports.

topPlaces.name: Narendrapur
topPlaces.description: Narendrapur is a locality in Rajpur Sonarpur of South 24 Parganas district in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is a part of the area covered by the Kolkata Metropolitan Development Authority (KMDA).

topPlaces.name: Bipadtarini Chandibari, Rajpur
topPlaces.description: Bipadtarini Chandibari or Bipattarini Chandibari is a Hindu temple dedicated to the Hindu goddess Bipadtarini, one of the aspect goddess and 108 avatars of Maa Durga. Located on S.B. Das Road in Rajpur Sonarpur, South 24 Parganas in West Bengal, it is one of the few and most important shrines of Maa Bippatarini in the Indian subcontinent.

topPlaces.name: Ramakrishna Mission Vidyalaya, Narendrapur
topPlaces.description: Ramakrishna Mission Vidyalaya, Narendrapur is a unit of Ramakrishna Mission Ashrama, Narendrapur, which is a branch of Ramakrishna Mission with headquarters at Belur. It is affiliated to the West Bengal Council of Higher Secondary Education and West Bengal Board of Secondary Education, having Bengali, English and Hindi Mediums.

topPlaces.name: Ramchandrapur, Sonarpur
topPlaces.description: Ramchandrapur is a census town within the jurisdiction of the Sonarpur police station in the Sonarpur CD block in the Baruipur subdivision of the South 24 Parganas district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Kamalgazi
topPlaces.description: Kamalgazi is a locality of Rajpur Sonarpur in South 24 Parganas district in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is a part of the area covered by the Kolkata Metropolitan Development Authority (KMDA).

topPlaces.name: Harinavi
topPlaces.description: Harinavi is a locality of Rajpur Sonarpur in South 24 Parganas district in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is a part of the area covered by the Kolkata Metropolitan Development Authority (KMDA).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chintamoni Kar Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chintamoni Kar Bird Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chintamoni Kar Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (25 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (18 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chintamoni Kar Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chintamoni Kar Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chintamoni Kar Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Chintamoni Kar Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chintamoni Kar Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Narendrapur Wildlife Sanctuary, Ramakrishna Stadium, Narendrapur, Bipadtarini Chandibari, Rajpur, Ramakrishna Mission Vidyalaya, Narendrapur.
